haiku45.summary_excerpt: Critical task requirements unmet: No Pester test file, no test fixtures, workflow lacks test harness/act integration, no act-result.txt artifact, no actionlint validation shown, no TDD methodology evidence. PowerShell missing Set-StrictMode, $ErrorActionPreference='Stop', -ErrorAction Stop on cmdlets. Regex matching duplicated in Get-BumpType (~lines 34-50) and Get-ChangelogEntry (~lines 82-105). Workflow assumes version.json/commits.txt exist without setup. Task explicitly requires all tests ru

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Well-structured script with clear boundaries and a dot-sourcing guard for testability. Workflow is clean with least-privilege permissions. Minor deduction for duplicated commit regexes (lines 41-47 vs 88-94) and missing Set-StrictMode/ErrorAction Stop best practices in PowerShell.
